title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
### Felicitated with Bhamashah Award by Shri Bhajan Lal Sharma, Hon'ble Chief Minister, Rajasthan for SEED- A CSR Initiative 
### Awarded Best Mobile Banking Service of the Year 2025 by Synnex India.
### Awarded at Finnoviti 2025 for pioneering the OCEN-GeM Sahay 2.0 intitative.
### IDBI Bank wins Transunion CIBIL 'Best Data Quality Award' 2023-2024 for Private Banks- Commerical Segment 
### IDBI Bank wins the Dhanam Best private Sector Bank of the Year Award 
### IDBI Bank wins Prestigious Award at ‘EKAM 2023’ for “New i-Astra Module”
### IDBI Bank wins three awards at the ASSOCHAM 18th Annual Summit & Awards-Banking & Financial Sector Lending Companies
### IDBI Bank has been felicitated at the Global Fintech Festival 2023 for EV charging Fee Collection through FASTag 
### IDBI Bank has been felicitated for the Best performance in CASA 
### IDBI Bank winner of BFSI Tech Summit and Awards 2022 
### IDBI Bank received the prestigious “FINNOVITI Award 2022" for Softoken
